focus_anchor: current focus consolidate the operator manual into auto triggered cross runtime skills
why_now: `ap2/howto.md` surviving as the canonical operation manual is exactly the focus's delete-test failure ("if howto.md survives as the canonical operation manual, the consolidation didn't happen"); the deploy code already flags this step in-line ("the `ap2-howto.md` target stays until the later howto-retirement task", `ap2/sandbox.py`), so the surface is only half-retired until the file is gone.
